caption: The image features a man with a long gray beard and mustache, wearing a black hat and dark clothing, looking slightly away from the camera. White text overlaid on the image reads, “i do not like taking pictures” at the top and “oh well, go ahead take it” at the bottom. The background is a plain, muted brownish color.

The image shows an aerial view of a dense urban skyline, prominently featuring the twin towers of the World Trade Center, with surrounding skyscrapers and a body of water visible in the foreground. Large white text overlays the image, reading “everybody” at the top and “hates chris” at the bottom. The scene is bathed in warm, golden light, suggesting either sunrise or sunset.

The image is a black-and-white photograph showing three young boys standing together outdoors. They are wearing simple, worn clothing, and each has a chain around their neck. The image has text overlaid at the top and bottom reading “4 years with these kids” and “I’m tired.”

A man in a white shirt and black tie, wearing glasses and an apron, is focused on mixing ingredients in a metal bowl in a professional kitchen. Behind him, stainless steel commercial appliances and glass doors are visible. The image has large white text reading "Local restaurant gets new" at the top and "slow cooker" at the bottom.

The image features a gorilla sitting with its arms crossed, looking directly forward with a serious expression. The background is a solid, dark brown tone. White text at the top and bottom reads, "how i stare at the homie" and "when i know he's lying," respectively.

A young Black man with a distressed expression, eyes squeezed shut and mouth open, raises both hands with fingers spread in a gesture of disbelief or frustration. He is wearing a light blue button-down shirt with a contrasting collar and cuffs against a plain background. The image has text overlaid at the top that reads, "My face when racism exists."

The image is a black-and-white photograph of several men in military-style uniforms standing in a room, with most raising their right arms in a Nazi salute. Superimposed text in bold, white letters reads "raise your hand" at the top and "if you're trash" at the bottom. The setting appears to be an indoor room with tables, chairs, and framed pictures on the walls.

A woman with Down syndrome is seen in a mirror applying makeup in a bathroom. She wears a red floral top and a pink headband, looking at her reflection with a focused expression. The image includes text overlay that reads "down syndrome girl put on makeup for a party."

The image is a two-panel meme comparing technology. The top panel shows a soldier from 1940 holding a rifle, labeled "polish remover 1940." The bottom panel displays modern beauty products including cotton pads, q-tips, and a bottle of makeup remover on a wooden surface, labeled "polish remover 2019."

The image shows a person in a full-body bomb suit, including a helmet and respirator, walking across a dirt field. The individual carries a device on their belt and is holding a small object in one hand. Text overlaid on the image reads, "When your Muslim gf invites you over for dinner."

The image features a man wearing traditional Middle Eastern attire, including a white keffiyeh and agal, smiling at the camera. He has a gray beard and is positioned against a green backdrop. Text overlaid on the image reads: “My wife called me a paedophile” at the top and “that’s a big word for a 9 year old” at the bottom.

This is a black-and-white photograph of Adolf Hitler in a military-style uniform, standing with one hand on his hip and the other resting near his side. He is looking slightly to his right with a serious expression, and his characteristic mustache is visible. Text overlays the image, reading: “i could have annihilated all of them” at the top and “but i left some of them alive so you will know why i was killing them” at the bottom.

A Black man dressed as Santa Claus sits in a chair, wearing a red and white festive outfit with a fluffy hat and gloves. He is holding a white teddy bear and smiling, with a football partially visible behind him. The text “black santa” is overlaid at the bottom of the image.

The image is a black-and-white portrait of Adolf Hitler, showing him from the chest up with a stern expression. Superimposed text at the top reads “kills: 17 million, deaths: 1,” and at the bottom, it says “Worst man ever.” The photo appears to be an official or formal portrait.

The image shows a person standing at night in a wooded area, illuminated by a light source, with a large, furry creature resembling a lion or a similar animal standing beside them. White text overlays the image, reading “had secret door before it was cool.” The background includes dark trees and a starry sky, with snowflakes or water droplets visibly falling.

A young man in a light blue collared shirt smiles at the camera, with a lit menorah visible in the background. The menorah has several lit candles, casting a warm glow. Text at the top reads, “your jewish cousins are visiting today. so please behave yourself me:”.

The image is a two-panel meme. The top panel shows a smiling man with shampoo foam on his head under a shower, with the text "vanish shampoo" overlaid. The bottom panel shows a small white monkey in a cage, appearing to hold or interact with a small object.

The image shows an aerial view of a dense city skyline at dusk or dawn, with a tall, central skyscraper prominently illuminated. Text overlays the image, reading "Imagine a world" at the top and "without hate" at the bottom. A river or body of water borders the city on the right side.

A family of five is having a picnic on a grassy area near a pond, with a winding road visible in the background. They are seated on a patterned blanket, sharing food including a cake and corn on the cob, under a sunny sky with trees in the distance. The image includes the text overlay: "just admit it, summer picnics are better."

A man in a white shirt is being escorted by two police officers wearing uniforms and helmets. The officers are holding the man’s arms as they walk him away. Text overlays at the top and bottom of the image read “if i was arrested what do” and “u think i got arrested 4?”.

The image is a two-panel meme. The top panel shows a young Black boy in a red and white striped shirt, smiling at the camera. The bottom panel features a close-up of a gorilla’s face looking toward the viewer, with the text “be kind to others and animals” overlaid across both panels.

The image is a black-and-white photograph showing two men seated outdoors. The man in the foreground is laughing heartily with his hands clasped, while the man behind him is also smiling. Text overlaid on the image reads, “Put the laughter back in manslaughter.”

A woman and a young girl are sitting on a wooden floor, playing with colorful blocks. The woman appears to be helping the girl build with the toys. The background shows a living room with furniture and houseplants.

A man with a fierce expression, pointing forward, is at the center of a crowd of people raising their fists; the image has text overlaid that reads, “stop saying my religion is violent.. I will be very sad.” Green flags and other protesters are visible in the background under a bright sky.

An elderly man with gray hair is seated in a wheelchair, facing away from the camera with his arms raised wide in an open posture. He is positioned in a brightly lit indoor space with large windows showing a city view, while other people sit in the background. Text overlays on the image read “heeeaddddd shoulders” above his head and “wheel and frame” twice near the wheelchair.

A smiling woman runs outdoors in a lush, green forested area, wearing a black tank top and colorful athletic shorts while holding a water bottle. She appears energetic and joyful as she moves along a grassy path. The text "i love to run" is overlaid at the top of the image.

The image shows two police officers in uniform inside what appears to be a police station. In the foreground, a Black woman officer is standing, looking directly at the camera with a serious expression. Behind her, a male officer in a similar uniform is visible, standing near a window.

A woman with a white headband and visible injuries, including blood near her mouth and a cut above her lip, looks down with a hand near her face. The text overlay reads “oops. broke the dishwasher again.” She is wearing a white tank top against a plain gray background.

A Black man with a beard and mustache is smiling at the camera, wearing a black turtleneck and a gray checkered blazer. Behind him, there are out-of-focus green plants and a small red flower. White text is overlaid at the top of the image.

A man lies motionless on a bed of dry leaves and twigs, his white t-shirt and skin covered in blood splatters. His arms are outstretched, and his head is tilted back with his eyes closed. The image includes text at the top and bottom that reads: "the face you make when you don't understand what 'stop resisting' means."

A man in an orange shirt and headband is shown from a low angle, with a goat nuzzling his face against a clear blue sky. The text "lunch prayers" appears at the top, and "answered" at the bottom. The man has a small piece of food or straw in his mouth, and the goat’s mouth is close to his.

A young girl with reddish hair is swimming in a clear blue swimming pool, her face partially submerged and mouth open. The water ripples around her, reflecting sunlight. The text "4 ways to boil vegetables" is overlaid at the top of the image.

The image is a three-panel meme. The top panel shows a person holding a sign that reads “AND IF YOU DON’T LIKE IT SHE DOESN’T CARE!” with the text overlay “people are able to be open about the lgbtq.” The middle panel depicts the White House illuminated in rainbow colors, with the text “thanks to the government opening their hearts.” The bottom panel features a portrait of Barack Obama with the text “and it all started with this wonderful man.”
A police officer is escorting a handcuffed man out of a house at night. The man is smiling and appears to be in a playful or nonchalant mood. A caption above reads, "LOOK... ALREADY HAS A WARRANT."

The image is a black-and-white photograph showing a man in a military-style uniform standing in an open-top car, extending his arms to shake hands with people lining the street. A crowd surrounds the vehicle, with many individuals raising their hands toward the man. The image includes a caption at the top reading, “when you’re proud of finishing a race.”

The image displays a sepia-toned depiction of a person on a cross against a cloudy sky with sun rays. Text overlays at the top and bottom provide instructions that appear to be a humorous or misleading guide for making "jew jerky." The bottom text advises storing the item in a cool, dark place for three days.

The image shows a man in a red plaid shirt and backpack, screaming with a terrified expression. Behind him, a large, hairy creature resembling Bigfoot extends a hand toward his face. Text at the top reads "Jack's links presents" and at the bottom, "messing with sasquatch."

The image displays a diverse group of people, mostly smiling, posing together in what appears to be an indoor, brightly lit space. They are dressed in casual to smart-casual attire and are arranged in a loose group formation. Text overlaid at the top and bottom of the image reads “similar to sharks” and “because all the great ones are white,” respectively.

A pregnant woman lies on a medical exam table, undergoing an ultrasound, while a healthcare provider stands beside her, pointing at the monitor. The monitor displays a fetal image, and the scene appears to be in a clinical setting. Superimposed text reads, "LOOK... ALREADY HAS A WARRANT."

The image shows the inside of an open dishwasher with its lower rack loaded with dishes, including plates and utensils. The upper rack is partially visible in the background. A white plastic support or divider is positioned across the lower rack.

The image shows a smiling elderly man with glasses and a gray beard, wearing a dark gray V-neck sweater over a light blue collared shirt, set against a plain light gray background. White text overlays the image, reading “went down on a muslim bitch” at the top and “her pussy was the bomb!” at the bottom. The man’s expression is cheerful and he is looking directly at the camera.

Two anthropomorphized food items, a potato and an avocado, are drawn with smiling faces and arms, appearing to embrace while tucked under a floral-patterned blanket against a pink background. The potato is beige and the avocado is green with a textured skin. The image includes text at the top: "when you told her you was going to fuck her till she was stupid."

A man in a white robe and pointed hat, resembling a wizard or magician costume, raises his hand while smiling. He wears a red sash with a white emblem and stands on a sidewalk surrounded by trees and other people, some of whom are also in costumes. The image includes an overlaid text caption that reads, “Wouldn’t want to be neighbors with these people.”

The image is a two-panel meme. The top panel shows two people sitting close together with their hands clasped over a cushion, with the text “love is more powerful” overlaid. The bottom panel displays a historical illustration of a public execution scene with the text “than any other force in the world” overlaid.

A vibrant purple, glittery lipstick is displayed with its cap off, showing the metallic, sparkly shade. The lipstick is housed in a sleek, black cylindrical tube with a reflective surface. White text overlaid at the bottom reads, "she put on the purple lipstick and she became the bomb."

The image displays three women in profile, arranged side-by-side against a plain background. Each woman wears a white floral crown and a white dress, with text labels beneath them reading “miss 2016,” “miss 2017,” and “miss 2018.” Their hairstyles and makeup vary slightly, reflecting the different years.

A young boy stands on a dirt path in a wooded area, holding a small goat. He is shirtless and wearing shorts, looking directly at the camera with a serious expression. The image has text overlaying it that reads, “when your little bomber brings home his first girlfriend.”

A group of young girls, wearing various colorful headscarves, are smiling and looking toward the camera outdoors. Text overlayed on the image reads “I’m the burka” at the top and “you must be fucking joking” at the bottom. The background includes trees and a rocky surface.

The image displays the national flag of Israel, featuring two horizontal blue stripes and a central blue Star of David on a white field. At the bottom of the flag, a white text overlay reads, "this is the worst cancer i've ever seen." The flag appears to be slightly wrinkled, suggesting it is made of fabric.

A group of diverse people are standing together in a line, smiling at the camera. The image has text overlaid: "similar to sharks" at the top and "because they all have teeth" at the bottom. The people are dressed in casual to business-casual attire and appear to be posing for a photograph in an indoor setting.

A person is standing in front of an open dishwasher in a kitchen, reaching into the lower rack. The image has text overlaid that reads "the fucking dishwasher is acting up!" The person is wearing a white shirt and blue jeans, with a watch on their left wrist.

This is a black-and-white photograph of the main gate of the former Auschwitz concentration camp, with the infamous inscription "Arbeit Macht Frei" (Work Sets You Free) above the entrance. Snow covers the ground around the gate, and bare trees line the pathway leading into the camp. A subtitle at the bottom reads, "now it only remains a reminder of the past."

A young man in a school uniform and backpack stands by a locker, looking down with a sad expression. In the blurred background, several other students are visible, with one pointing toward him. Text overlays the image, reading "when they point you out because you're looking sad" at the top and "but haven't asked the reason why" at the bottom.

Two men in suits are seated at a wooden table, both laughing heartily while looking at a smartphone held by the man on the left. Text above the man on the right reads "ha!!" and below the table reads "i won an award!!". A pair of glasses rests on the table between them.

The image shows a close-up of a birthday cake with colorful candles lit and upright, surrounded by sprinkles. Text overlaid at the top asks, “porn casting or terrorist recruitment?”, while text at the bottom reads “-yes i can blow.” The background is softly blurred with pastel colors.

A young boy with dark skin and short hair stares directly at the camera with wide eyes and slightly open mouth. He is wearing a green and yellow garment. Text at the bottom reads, "when mommy says a bad word."

The image is a two-panel meme: the top panel shows a joyful child holding a rugby ball above their head, while the bottom panel features a monkey dressed in a red sports jersey holding a soccer ball. Text at the top reads "both humans and animals," and text at the bottom reads "can enjoy sports."

A woman wearing a light-colored hijab is seated and smiling while playing a ukulele. The image has text overlaid that reads, “this one is called sexy times with that sheep of mine.” The background is softly blurred, with warm tones and indistinct shapes.

The image shows a man with glasses and a neutral expression seated in a wheelchair, wearing a dark jacket over a collared shirt. A computer or communication device is visible to his right. Text at the bottom reads, "The original derp-fac."

A man with glasses and a beard sits at a desk in a dimly lit office, looking directly at the camera. In the background, two other people are seated at computers, engaged in work. The image includes overlaid text that reads: “The difference between this and darkness? One won't rob you.”

The image shows a young boy and a chimpanzee sitting side by side at a desk, both dressed in business suits and wearing glasses. They are positioned in front of a plain background with office items like a rotary phone and stacks of papers. Text at the top and bottom of the image reads, “don’t be racist” and “black and white children are the same,” respectively.

A black-and-white photograph shows a man in military uniform raising his right arm in a salute while holding a microphone in his left hand. Text is superimposed over the image, including phrases like “the gas bill is too damn high funny offensive” and “memes offensive pictures ever most.” The man’s face is partially illuminated, and he appears to be speaking to a crowd.

Soldiers in uniform carry red-covered bodies on their shoulders in a procession. The image has overlaid text reading "Keep Ulster tidy 1973" at the top and "get rid of the rubbish" at the bottom. Other soldiers are visible in the background standing near military vehicles.

This is a black-and-white historical photograph showing Adolf Hitler and Benito Mussolini seated together in an open-top vehicle, both smiling and appearing to interact. Hitler is on the left, wearing a German military-style cap and uniform with insignia, while Mussolini is on the right in a dark cap and uniform adorned with medals. In the background, a crowd of uniformed individuals is visible, suggesting a public event or parade.

A woman with a plus size figure stands outdoors beside a swimming pool, using crutches for support. She wears a light green bikini top and white shorts, and has a small tattoo on her right thigh. The background includes grass, trees, and the edge of the pool.

A young girl with blonde hair, wearing a red patterned shirt, holds a black handgun in her right hand while looking intently forward. The image includes white text overlays reading "white kids be like" at the top and "i have had enough" at the bottom. The background is a plain, light gray wall.

A young man and woman are taking a selfie together outdoors, seated in front of a chain-link fence. The man holds the phone above them, smiling broadly, while the woman sits beside him with a mild smile. The image includes overlaid text reading, "when your little bomber brings home his first girlfriend."

A brown goat with horns stands in a grassy field under a bright blue sky with scattered clouds. The goat is looking directly at the camera with its mouth slightly open, appearing to chew. Text overlaid at the top reads, “mohamed, i'm pregnant.”

A person with blonde hair and reflective sunglasses is smoking a cigarette outdoors, with smoke visible around their face. The background is blurred greenery, suggesting a natural setting like a camp. Text overlays read “this one time at camp” at the top and “we got baked” at the bottom.

A black-and-white photograph shows a man in a suit seated at a table with cups, a glass, and a bottle, looking off to the side. The image has bold white text at the top that reads, “DID SOMEONE SAY GAS?” The man’s expression appears neutral or slightly amused as he gazes away from the camera.

This is a historical illustration depicting enslaved African people aboard a ship, with some chained and others standing or kneeling under the watch of sailors. The scene shows a ship’s deck with ropes, barrels, and other maritime equipment, and a large man in a hat stands prominently with arms crossed. The image includes text at the top and bottom reading “if it’s an evil past” and “it should never happen again.”

The image features two identical gray kittens wearing yellow knitted hats with green leaf-like tops and oversized round glasses—one with green frames, the other with yellow. Both kittens have expressive blue eyes and are set against a solid yellow background, with text overlaid at the top and bottom.

The image is a two-panel meme. The top panel shows a light blue vintage Volkswagen Beetle with text reading "vw cars produce more gas than expected." The bottom panel features a black-and-white portrait of Adolf Hitler with the text "ach! that's my car."

A tabby cat is sitting inside an open oven, looking out with wide eyes. The oven interior and door show signs of use, with dirt and stains visible. Text overlaid at the top reads "cat chillin in china."

A smiling woman in a patterned dress and apron stands in a vintage kitchen, holding a plate while standing beside a sink filled with clean dishes. The black-and-white photo features tile walls, a window with blinds, and a retro-style sink and faucet. Text at the bottom reads, “happy international sandwich maker's day from make aus grouse again.”

The image shows a man in the foreground with an intense, yelling expression, pointing forward. Behind him, a crowd of people with raised fists and flags appears to be protesting. Text overlays on the image include the word "rape" at the top and a phrase at the bottom reading "helping them have sex for generations."

The image shows a woman with shoulder-length brown hair, wearing a black top and a beaded necklace, looking off to the side with a displeased expression. White text overlays the image, reading “the face you make” at the top and “when one of those damn apes cancels your show” at the bottom. The background is plain and light-colored.

Five young adults are gathered closely together, smiling at the camera in what appears to be a casual indoor setting. They are positioned in a semi-circle, with some leaning in toward the center. The image has text overlaid at the top reading, “what’s better than chilling with friends.”

The image shows a row of coin-operated laundry machines, with the central one’s door open. A woman is visible inside, smiling and waving with both hands. Text overlays read, “rare picture of a” at the top and “dishwasher at birth” at the bottom.

Two women are standing side by side against a pink background, smiling at the camera. The woman on the left has bright pink hair and wears a sparkly top with a light-colored skirt, while the woman on the right has dark hair, bangs, and wears a white top with dark pants. Text overlaid on the image reads, “they’re in a relationship, who makes the other laugh the most?”

The image is a meme featuring two separate photos. The top photo shows a woman speaking at a podium with the NAACP of Colorado logo behind her, with text overlay claiming her ancestors fought an enemy. The bottom photo shows a black-and-white image of Adolf Hitler and a woman seated together, with text overlay identifying them as “those enemies.”

A black-and-white photograph shows a man and a young woman seated at a table near a large window with a snowy landscape visible outside. The table holds a teapot, cups, and a small floral arrangement. A caption at the bottom reads, “WHEN THEY SAY WHITE FOLKS DON’T KNOW HOW TO COOK.”

The image shows numerous mosquitoes clustered on a light-colored, possibly translucent surface. Superimposed text reads: "they suck the western welfare systems dry, outbreed to become a majority, lobby for their own laws and takeover." Below that, another line says: "like and share if you are sick of it."

The image displays two glowing, X-shaped chromosome structures against a dark background. White text at the top reads, "when someone asks me how many chromosomes i have," and text at the bottom reads, "more than you." The chromosomes are illuminated in an orange-yellow hue, resembling fire or light.

A woman with short dark hair and visible tattoos on her right arm and shoulder stands outdoors, wearing a white tank top. She looks over her shoulder toward the camera with a neutral expression. The background shows a blurred field and distant greenery under an overcast sky.

This is a black-and-white historical photograph of a man in a military uniform, saluting with his right arm extended. He wears a cap, a tunic with insignia on the collar and sleeve, and tall boots. The image has the words "Gas was this high" superimposed in white text at the top and bottom.

A man in a white robe with blue stripes and a pointed hat is raising his hand in a celebratory gesture outdoors. He is surrounded by other people, some in costumes, on a sidewalk near trees and parked cars. Text overlaid on the image reads, “My name is cra gonna love this, every single house here recycles.”

A man with a beard lies on grass, smiling while embracing a white dog that is also lying down with its mouth open. The image has overlaid text reading “WHEN HER MOUTH SAYS NO” at the top and “BUT HER BODY SAYS ‘LIKE I’M A GONNA STOP YOU’” at the bottom. The background shows an outdoor setting with greenery and soft lighting.

A young woman with visible bruises around her eye and a pink wristband rests her chin on her clenched fist. Her expression is somber and her gaze is directed slightly away from the camera. The text "international day against violence" is overlaid at the bottom of the image.

An orange "DANGER MINES" warning sign is posted on a fence in a grassy, open field near a body of water under a partly cloudy sky. The image has white text overlaying it: "build a wall" at the top and "mines work too" at the bottom. Barbed wire runs along the fence line in front of the sign.

The image is a composite of two scenes: the top shows a group of people wearing red shirts with "Poland Stands With USA" and holding a "TRUMP 2020 - KEEP AMERICA GREAT!" banner. The bottom scene features a group of people at a beach party, holding rainbow flags and smiling, with the overlaid text "than nasty i'd rather be deplorable."

The image shows a large plume of smoke rising from the upper floors of the World Trade Center’s Twin Towers in New York City. The sky is clear blue, and other city buildings are visible in the background. Text overlaid on the image reads, “I was just chilling there ... and suddenly I got WiFi from an airplane.”

A man dressed in Western attire—including a wide-brimmed hat, blue shirt, red bandana, pinstripe pants, and spurs—sits confidently in a rocking chair on a wooden porch. His hands rest on his knees, and he has a serious, determined expression. The image includes overlaid text that reads “bring on the refugees” at the top and “im fucking ready” at the bottom.

A man with a beard and bandana, wearing an orange shirt, has his lips puckered as a goat leans in to nuzzle his mouth. The image is overlaid with text reading “islamic prayers” at the top and “answered” at the bottom. The background is a clear blue sky.

The image features a woman with long hair, wearing a white earbud and a smartwatch, looking at her wrist as if checking time. In the foreground, a small figure of a person stands on the ground, appearing much smaller than the woman. Text at the top reads “how do you get a jewish girls number?” and at the bottom, “roll up her sleeve.”

A smiling bald Black man wearing glasses and a dark jacket stands outdoors in front of parked cars. Text overlaid on the image reads, "There is nothing wrong with them." and "Everyone should own one."

The image is a black-and-white photograph showing a group of people in white robes and hoods, standing in a circle around a large, flaming cross. Some figures have their arms outstretched, while others hold torches, all set against a dark, nighttime background. Text overlays at the top and bottom provide historical context, stating “following the civil war,” and “the ku klux klan emerges to suppress and victimize newly freed slaves.”

A man with glasses, a bow tie, and suspenders stands smiling in front of a chalkboard filled with mathematical equations and geometric shapes. He has a pocket protector with pens in his shirt pocket. The image includes overlaid text that reads, “deadpool: so when i get out of the hospital i’m going to join you? the avengers visiting him:”.

A woman with curly brown hair lies on her stomach on a fluffy rug, propping her head up with her hands and smiling while looking at a large television screen in front of her. She is wearing pink and yellow pajamas, with her bare feet pointing upward. The image includes text overlaying the top: "Look at the size of my new tv compared to my dishwasher!"

A young man with visible vitiligo stares directly at the camera, wearing a dark green bomber jacket with a patterned lower hem. White text at the top reads “last year was the best year,” and at the bottom, “#2020sucks.” The background is plain white.

The image shows a blonde woman with braces, smiling at the camera while wearing a black sleeveless top. She is standing outdoors with a red wall and a poster visible behind her. Text at the top reads "handjobs" and at the bottom "sold seperately."

A smiling Black man in a blue polo shirt and rainbow-colored medal ribbon looks at the camera while carrying a backpack. He is outdoors in a crowd, with other people and colorful banners visible in the blurred background. Text at the top reads, “I am against gun, violence and discrimination.”

The image shows a close-up of a young woman with visible bruising and redness around her right eye and cheek. Her expression is somber and she is looking slightly away from the camera. A text overlay at the bottom reads, “Abuse is never to be tolerated.”

A man in a black tuxedo with a bow tie looks upward with a thoughtful expression. The image has white text at the top reading "looking to the stars shine bright stay focused." Another person in formal attire is partially visible in the background to the left.

A black-and-white photograph shows a person with short, curly hair, heavy eye makeup, and a swastika tattoo on their cheek. They are holding a cigarette between their lips and wearing a choker with dangling chains. The word “GERMANS” is superimposed in bold, white capital letters across the top of the image.

The image shows a large explosion with bright orange and yellow flames engulfing the scene. In the foreground, there are military-style vehicles, including a tank, and what appears to be a truck, partially obscured by smoke and debris. The background features trees and buildings under a hazy, smoke-filled sky.

A woman wearing a pink visor and black swimsuit stands on a sandy beach with the ocean in the background. The text “fun day at the beach” is overlaid at the top and bottom of the image. Her expression is neutral as she looks directly at the camera.

A woman wearing a white knit hat and sweater sits relaxed in the bed of a pickup truck parked by a lake, holding a small object. She is positioned near the truck's tailgate, with mountains visible in the background. A silver thermos and a backpack are near her, and the truck's rear lights are visible.

Two young women in colorful dresses are posing playfully amidst a backdrop of cardboard boxes and trash bags, one crouching and the other sitting on the floor, both holding wooden objects. The scene is set in a cluttered, dimly lit space with industrial elements. Text at the bottom reads “just girls having fun.”

A large group of young boys, many wearing white caps, are seated in a circle inside a building with ornate, patterned windows. Adults are seated among them, appearing to lead or instruct the children. White text overlays the image, reading, “if you want good life for your children send them here.”

The image shows a woman in a black hijab holding a tablet and smiling while looking at a man in traditional white Arab attire. The man, wearing a keffiyeh and agal, has a surprised expression with his hand on his chin. Text at the top reads, “MOHAMED I'M PREGNANT.”

A woman with long brown hair and blue eyes looks directly at the camera, her hands gently touching her neck. The image has text overlaid that reads, “they are like bacon. they look good, smell good but will slowly kill you.” The background is a plain, light gray.

Two people are clasping hands in a gesture of support or unity. The image features bold text overlaying the top and bottom: “KEEP US STRONG” and “KEEP OUR RELATIONSHIP PURE.” The background is bright and out of focus, emphasizing the hands.

A newborn baby lies on its back on a blue blanket inside what appears to be an incubator, with arms raised and an open mouth. The baby has a bandage on its right wrist and is surrounded by white plastic discs. Text at the top of the image reads, "an unhappy baby is a loud baby."

A bald child in a purple outfit lies on a hospital bed, looking at the camera with one foot raised, while a medical professional in scrubs and a mask stands in the background. The image has overlaid text reading "when I grow up" above the child's head and "lol nevermind" below. The setting appears to be a medical room with tiled walls and equipment visible.
